articles.title: GLOBAL MARKETS-Stocks set records in Japan, South Korea; dollar gets Fed boost
articles.description: Global markets surged on Friday, with shares in Japan and South Korea reaching record highs, as oil prices dropped and the US dollar strengthened following a hawkish Federal Reserve statement.

articles.title: The road from Aden to Jamnagar: How Dhirubhai Ambani built the Reliance empire
articles.description: Before he became a household name, Ambani moved to Aden in the 1950s, when it was a major trading hub under British control. He worked for a trading company and is also widely reported to have spent time at a petrol station.

articles.title: Oil falls as supply starts moving through Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: Oil prices fell on Friday on the prospect of more supply returning to the market after oil tankers began to move through the ​Strait of Hormuz following the signing of the U.S.-Iran interim peace deal.
